must_have_skills: Indian GAAP and Ind AS accounting standards
GST, TDS, and direct tax compliance
Advanced Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUP, financial modeling)
nice_to_have_skills: Experience in manufacturing or technology sectors
core_problems_to_solve: manage the full accounting cycle, prepare and review financial statements, ensure compliance with tax regulations, and develop internal control policies.
implicit_soft_skills: supervise and mentor junior accounting staff
support budgeting and financial planning activities
